title: rhododendron molle
intro: Rhododendron molle, also known as the pink azalea, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family and is native to the Himalayas and China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron molle include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. The plant is prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
